ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Crowdfunding ID of the project */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or project creator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Funding goal of the project */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Amount pledged to the project */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed, canceled) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the project */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the project */,
  "launched_date" TEXT /* Date the project was launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project ended */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, suspended, archived) */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL where the project is hosted */,
  "project_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the project's main image */,
  "project_video" TEXT /* URL or path to the project's main video */,
  "project_updates" TEXT /* Text field for project updates */,
  "project_tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., film & video, music, photography) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the category's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category (e.g., drama, rock, photography books) */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the subcategory's image */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the project belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-category the project belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "category_id", "subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the backer contributed to */,
  "contribution" INTEGER /* Amount contributed by the backer */,
  "support_date" TEXT /* Date the backer made the contribution */,
  "backer_name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "backer_email" TEXT /* Email of the backer */,
  "backer_address" TEXT /* Address of the backer */,
  "backer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the backer */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward the backer received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_picks" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Whether the project is a staff pick */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spotlights" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Whether the project is a spotlight feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project creator, backer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_creators" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the project */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user accessing the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
